text.zh: 逻辑理论家 是 BenchCouncil AI100 叙事中的一个 AI 历史成就节点。
text.en: Logic Theorist is an AI history achievement node in the BenchCouncil AI100 storyline.

text.zh: 逻辑理论家 的技术线索包括「启发式证明搜索」，代表性产物是「逻辑理论机器」。
text.en: Logic Theorist is described through the method "Heuristic proof search" and the artifact "Logic Theory Machine".

text.zh: 逻辑理论家 是当前 legacy 展示中的一个 AI 历史节点。
text.en: Logic Theorist is an AI history milestone in the current legacy presentation.

text.zh: 1956 年，艾伦·纽厄尔、赫伯特·A·西蒙和 J·C·肖 构建了 Logic Theorist，用来发现符号逻辑中的证明。它把定理证明视为由启发式规则引导的搜索问题，而不是穷举计算。这个系统成为自动推理、符号 AI 和信息加工认知观的重要里程碑。
text.en: In 1956, Allen Newell, Herbert A. Simon, and J. C. Shaw built the Logic Theorist to discover proofs in symbolic logic. It treated theorem proving as a search problem guided by heuristics rather than exhaustive calculation. The system became a landmark for automated reasoning, symbolic AI, and the information-processing view of cognition.
